rulings.Calendar Matter: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Petition For Letters Of Administration
rulings.Rulings: Since the parties - and this Court - agree that the Petition for administration of the estate is unnecessary, the Petition and the hearing currently scheduled for March 8, 2017 will be taken off calendar. Any party wishing to contest this tentative ruling by appearing at the scheduled hearing must so advise the courtroom clerk (415-551-3702) and opposing parties no later than 4:00 p.m. Tuesday, March 7, 2017.
